grants.title: USDA Section 502 Direct Rural Housing Loans
grants.notes: Zero-down loans for rural homebuyers. Container homes at $15K-$35K qualify.

grants.title: 45L Energy Efficient Home Credit
grants.notes: Builder credit. $500 cert cost → $2,500+ credit. 5x ROI. Requires Energy Star cert.

grants.title: 25C Energy Efficient Home Improvement Credit
grants.notes: 30% credit for buyers. Windows, insulation, heat pumps, doors. Expires Dec 2025.

grants.title: Residential Clean Energy Credit (25D)
grants.notes: 30% credit for solar, battery storage. Solar-ready containers = eligible.

grants.title: HUD Green Retrofit Program (Multifamily)
grants.notes: For multifamily green improvements. Can fund container community builds.

grants.title: EDA Manufacturing Grants
grants.notes: Job creation + manufacturing infrastructure. For container modification facility.

grants.title: California Housing Accelerator
grants.notes: Innovative construction methods. Containers qualify. CA-specific.

grants.title: Home Depot Foundation — Affordable Housing
grants.notes: Veteran + affordable housing. Best first foundation grant to apply for.

grants.title: Enterprise Community Partners Green Grants
grants.notes: Green affordable housing. Recycled materials angle = strong match.

grants.title: DOE Building Technologies L-Prize
grants.notes: Innovative manufactured housing. Check for 2025/2026 extension.
